content: Hey, I'm so glad it's finally Friday. I've been looking forward to this weekend all week. I'm planning to go for a marathon run in Forest Park on Saturday.
That sounds like a great way to spend your weekend! Forest Park is beautiful this time of year. Are you training for a specific marathon or just enjoying the scenery?
I'm actually training for the Portland Marathon in October. I've been working on my blockchain project at home and it's been keeping me pretty busy, but I always make time for my runs.

The Portland Marathon is a great goal to work towards. Blockchain development can be challenging, but it's good that you're prioritizing your running. Do you have a favorite route or spot in Forest Park that you like to run to?
Yeah, I love running to the Wildwood Trail. It's so peaceful and the trees are amazing. After my run, I'm planning to work on my home automation project and maybe even do some leatherworking.
The Wildwood Trail is a popular spot for runners. Home automation and leatherworking are interesting hobbies - what got you into those?
I've just always been interested in tech and crafting, I guess. I've been working on automating my parents' house too, since they're getting older and it's harder for them to get around.

That's very thoughtful of you. It can be challenging to take care of aging parents, but it's great that you're using your skills to make their lives easier. Do you have any fun plans for after the marathon in October?
Actually, I'm thinking about taking a trip to Tokyo with my colleague, Alex, from the DeFi protocol. We've been talking about it for months and I think it would be an amazing experience.
Tokyo is an incredible city! You'll have to try all the delicious food and visit the famous Shinjuku district. Have you and Alex started making any travel plans or booking flights yet?
Not yet, but we're planning to start looking into it soon. I'm also thinking about spinning some tracks at a DJ event when I get back from the trip.
You're a man of many talents, River! DJing is a great way to express yourself creatively. I'm sure you'll have a blast in Tokyo and at the DJ event when you get back.
